lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਏਕ ਏਕੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭਰਮਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: sej ek eko prabh tthaakur mehal na paavai manamukh bharameea |
lines.english: There is one bed for the soul-bride, and the same bed for God, her Lord and Master. The self-willed manmukh does not obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence; she wanders around, in limbo.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤ ਸਰਣਿ ਜੇ ਆਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਇ ਮਿਲੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਢੀਲ ਨ ਪਈਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur gur karat saran je aavai prabh aae milai khin dteel na peea |5|
lines.english: Uttering, "Guru, Guru", she seeks His Sanctuary; so God comes to meet her, without a moment's delay. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਸੁਆ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਬੇਟਾ ਜਨਮਿਆ ਪਿਤਾ ਤਾਹਿ ਕਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਈਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: besuaa kai ghar bettaa janamiaa pitaa taeh kiaa naam sadeea |6|
lines.english: When a son is born in the house of a prostitute, who can tell the name of his father? ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਿਆਚਾਰ ਵਧਾਏ ਮਨਿ ਪਾਖੰਡ ਕਰਮੁ ਕਪਟ ਲੋਭਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar kar kiriaachaar vadhaae man paakhandd karam kapatt lobheea |
lines.english: One may perform many rituals, but the mind is filled with hypocrisy, evil deeds and greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬ ਜਨਮਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਆਏ ਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਮਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: poorab janam bhagat kar aae gur har har har har bhagat jameea |
lines.english: Because of devotional worship in my past incarnations, I have been born into this life. The Guru has inspired me to worship the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਈਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bhagat bhagat karate har paaeaa jaa har har har har naam sameea |7|
lines.english: Worshipping, worshipping Him with devotion, I found the Lord, and then I merged into the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਬਾਹ ਪਕਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਢਿ ਲਈਆ ॥੮॥੬॥੨॥੧॥੬॥੯॥
lines.translit: jin kau tthaakur kirapaa dhaaree baah pakar naanak kadt leea |8|6|2|1|6|9|
lines.english: Our Lord and Master showers His Mercy upon us, and grasps hold of our arms; O Nanak, He lifts us up and saves us. ||8||6||9||2||1||6||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਣਿ ਆਣਿ ਮਹਿੰਦੀ ਪੀਸਾਈ ਆਪੇ ਘੋਲਿ ਘੋਲਿ ਅੰਗਿ ਲਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: prabh aan aan mahindee peesaaee aape ghol ghol ang leea |
lines.english: God Himself came and ground the henna leaves into powder, and applied it to my body.
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Twelfth House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
God's Lotus Feet are Infinite.
I have abandoned all others, seeking His Sanctuary. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਮਾ ਜਾਤ ਨ ਕਹੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਉਪਮਾ ਜਾਤ ਨ ਕਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: aupamaa jaat na kahee mere prabh kee upamaa jaat na kahee |
lines.english: I cannot express the Praises of my God; I cannot express His Praises.
My mind is in love with Them.
I am forever a sacrifice to Them.
If I were to abandon Them, there is nowhere else I could go. ||1||
I chant the Lord's Name with my tongue.
I have been carried across the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||
The filth of my sins and evil mistakes is burnt off.
Climbing aboard the Boat of the Saints, I am emancipated.
My mind is tied to the Lord with the string of love and devotion.
This is the Immaculate Way of the Saints.
They forsake sin and corruption.
They meet the Formless Lord God. ||3||
I taste the Perfect Flavor of Bliss.
The Lord God, Har, Har, dwells within my consciousness. ||4||
I do not waver or wander here or there.
Gazing upon God, I am wonderstruck.
Those who listen, fascinated, to the Unstruck Sound-Current of the Word,
Those who constantly remember God,
The treasure of virtue, will never go to hell.
Will never have to see the Messenger of Death with their eyes. ||5||
The Vedas do not know the Mystery of the Lord.
The Merciful Lord God is under the power of His devotees.
I seek the Sanctuary of the Lord, the Heroic Lord of the World.
It is so very difficult to serve Him.
The silent sages constantly serve Him. ||6||
He is the Destroyer of the pains and sorrows of the poor.
Hundreds of thousands of times, I humbly bow to Him.
He is pervading the water, the land and the sky. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee mit na jaanai koe |
lines.english: No one knows His limits.
I have grown weary, and I have collapsed at God's Door.
Please fulfill this, Nanak's wish. ||8||1||
O God, make me the dust of the feet of the Holy.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
I have grown weary, and collapsed at Your door.
The Love of the Lord, Har, Har, is sweet to my mind.
God, please release me from birth and death.
I grasp Your Feet, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
